key_findings: In-progress page has no snooze mechanism at all — InProgressInbox.tsx has no action buttons
New-ideas operator action Snooze is already fully wired end-to-end (ledger + API + UI)
New-ideas queue Defer already supports 3-day and 7-day periods via DEFER_PERIOD_OPTIONS
localStorage is the right storage for in-progress snooze: single-operator, plans are filesystem-derived, no cross-device requirement
Plan cards are identified by slug (directory name) — stable and unique
No D1 schema changes needed — active plans have no database backing
No new API routes needed for the localStorage path
One open operator-input question: whether new-ideas Defer should be relabelled as Snooze quick-picks
